2.0 Violation Details

CRITICAL VIO-001 SBC Ref: 61-4.2.2k

Proper cable terminations (no loose/missing lugs)

Bounding box detected at region
Description Worker on ladder handling loose electrical wires, potential fall hazard.
SBC Code 61-4.2.2k — Initial verification inspection shall confirm: adequacy of termination and connection of cables and conductors (no loose wires, proper lug connections).
Priority CRITICAL
MEDIUM VIO-002 SBC Ref: 52-2.6

Mechanical protection on wiring in impact-prone areas

Bounding box detected at region
Description Exposed electrical wiring on ceiling structure, not enclosed in conduit.
SBC Code 52-2.6 — Wiring systems subject to impact (AG) shall be protected by location or by additional mechanical protection such as conduit, trunking, or armor.
Priority MEDIUM
